overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked futuristic metropolis. The player character traverses a pedestrian overpass above a highway, then explores neon-lit sidewalks lined with holographic advertisements and corporate signage, concluding with a view of towering skyscrapers against the night sky.

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet concrete sidewalk toward a modern pedestrian overpass structure

entered.detail: futuristic covered walkway ramp with glass and metal construction
metallic pole with blue paint near the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked sidewalk at night in a futuristic city. The camera approaches a modern pedestrian overpass while neon signs glow in the background. The street is empty of pedestrians and vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway spanning multi-lane highway

events.description: ascends ramp onto elevated pedestrian overpass structure
pauses at railing to look down at traffic on highway below
descends ramp returning to street level sidewalk

agents.ego_description: climbing the overpass ramp, crossing above the highway while observing traffic below, then descending the opposite ramp

entered.detail: multi-lane road with yellow dividing lines visible below the overpass
transparent safety barrier along the overpass edge
tall building with illuminated grid-pattern windows

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a modern pedestrian overpass, providing an elevated view of the highway traffic below. The space is sheltered by the overpass structure with glass railings. After observing the sparse traffic, the camera descends back to street level.

events.description: passes NCPD building with large illuminated police department signage
police vehicle drives past on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past holographic advertisements and corporate storefronts

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the camera on the same sidewalk path

entered.detail: large illuminated sign for Night City Police Department with red and white lettering
floating digital advertisements displaying commercial products
illuminated street barriers cycling through blue, green, and pink colors

segments.scene_description: Walking through a vibrant commercial district lined with neon signs and holographic advertisements. The camera passes the NCPD police building and follows a pedestrian ahead while colorful illuminated barriers line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown pedestrian corridor with outdoor seating

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from cool blue to warm pink and orange tones
approaches outdoor plaza area with benches and planters

agents.ego_description: navigating the sidewalk while passing other pedestrians and approaching a seating area

notable_agents.action: walking in same direction ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large vibrant orange facade of adjacent building
illuminated benches with people sitting along the sidewalk
tall spiky plants in raised planters near the seating area

segments.scene_description: The walk continues through a moderately crowded downtown area where the neon lighting shifts to warmer pink and orange hues. The camera passes planters with spiky plants and approaches an outdoor seating plaza where people are resting on illuminated benches.

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the moon and towering skyscrapers above

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza area then stopping to look up at the skyscrapers and night sky

notable_agents.action: sitting on illuminated bench near the plaza

entered.detail: massive towering buildings with illuminated windows reaching into the night sky
full moon visible between the skyscrapers
airborne digital billboards hovering between buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide plaza intersection surrounded by massive skyscrapers. The camera passes people sitting on benches before tilting upward to reveal the moon and floating advertisement blimps between the towering buildings, emphasizing the vertical scale of the futuristic city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate, rain-slicked street into the heart of a vibrant, towering futuristic metropolis. It begins on an empty sidewalk, moving toward and ascending a modern pedestrian overpass to overlook the sparse highway traffic below before descending back to street level. As the camera enters a commercial district, the environment shifts into a neon-lit corridor of holographic advertisements and police buildings, following a pedestrian past colorful illuminated barriers. The scene then transitions into a warmer, pink-and-orange hued downtown area, passing spiky planters and an outdoor plaza where people rest on glowing benches. Finally, the path opens into a wide intersection surrounded by massive skyscrapers, with the camera tilting upward to reveal the moon and floating advertisement blimps suspended between the towering buildings.
